messages.text: The ground drags at your feet as an earthbind totem's pull roots and slows you, every step turned to leaden effort.
The earth clutches at {name}'s feet, dragging them down and slowing their movements.
The totem's pull releases you and your feet come free of the clinging earth.
The earth releases its grip on {name} and they move freely again.
{name} is held fast by an earthbind totem, feet dragging in the clinging earth.
